summary: Iteration 166: UI Design Overhaul Testing - Verified premium dark theme implementation across Login, Dashboard, Forum, AI Assistant, and Admin Dashboard pages. All key design elements working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All premium dark theme design changes verified working
Login page: Star background (.star-bg) rendering correctly, premium glass card with gradient and shadow
Dashboard KPI cards: 4 cards with .kpi-card class, left accent glow bars visible, large typography for stats
Share Trade Card dialog: Opens correctly with dark gradient background styling
Sidebar: CORE, GROWTH, COMMUNITY, ADMIN section labels visible, orange glow on active states
Forum page: Refined post cards, stat bar, category pills all rendering with dark theme
AI Assistant: Conversation sidebar, 6 smart prompts loaded from popular-prompts endpoint
Admin Dashboard: Premium stat cards with kpi-card styling, 6 Quick Action items visible
All dialogs/modals: Dark gradient background (not white), proper shadow effects
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 166 tested UI design overhaul. Key CSS classes verified: .star-bg (login), .glass-card, .glass-card-elevated, .kpi-card with accent variants (.accent-green, .accent-blue, .accent-purple), .btn-primary, .btn-secondary, .input-dark. All pages render with dark backgrounds (#050505 login, #070707 main). Dialogs have dark gradient styling. No functional changes - previous iteration 165 features still working.

login_page_design.details: Star background visible, premium glass card with gradient (rgba(18,18,18,0.92) to rgba(10,10,10,0.96)), orange Sign In button with glow effect

dashboard_kpi_cards.details: 4 KPI cards found (Account Value, Total Profit, Total Trades, Actual vs Projected) with kpi-card class, left accent bars with glow effects, large 3xl typography

share_trade_card_dialog.details: Share button (data-testid='share-performance-btn') opens ShareTradeCard dialog with Copy Text and Download buttons, dark gradient background

sidebar_sections.details: Section labels visible: CORE (Dashboard, Profit Tracker, Trade Monitor), GROWTH (Daily Habits, etc.), COMMUNITY (Forum, AI Assistant), ADMIN (collapsible)

forum_page_design.details: Forum list page with refined stat bar (Posts, Open, Solved, Comments), post cards with dark gradient, category pills with rounded-full styling

ai_assistant_design.details: Conversation sidebar visible, 6 smart prompts from active learning displayed, RyAI/zxAI tabs, dark premium backgrounds throughout

admin_dashboard_design.details: 4 premium stat cards (Total Members, Active Today, AI Sessions, Knowledge Base), 6 Quick Actions with gradient icons, dark theme consistent

dialogs_modals_styling.details: All dialogs tested (Share Trade Card, New Post, Onboarding Tour) have dark gradient background (bg-[#0d0d0d] or similar), no white backgrounds

tab_components.details: Dashboard tabs render with dark background and orange active state styling
